case_title: CEDRIC LAMAR JETER VS. SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED DEC-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-09-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CEDRIC LAMAR JETER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED RYAN SMITH VP OF HR. MATTER CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT IS TO SUBPOENA THE DELIVERY DRIVER WHO WAS AT THE SCENE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF CEDERIC LAMAR JETER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE ROBERTSON IS INFORMED OF THE PHONE MESSAGE OF MARCH 9, 2020, LEFT ON VICKI KEMP'S PHONE, OF DEFENDANT'S INABILITY TO APPEAR AT TODAYS HEARING DUE TO DEFENDANT HALTING ALL TRAVEL OF ITS EMPLLOYEES DUE TO THE CORNA VIRUS. THE TRIAL MOVES FORWARD. PLAINTIFF'S SHOW THE COURT A MEDICAL STATMENT ON HIS CELL PHONE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON JANUARY 8, 2020 ARE RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JETER, CEDRIC LAMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC. $3,961.14 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,051.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,961.14 FILED BY JETER, CEDRIC LAMAR AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST TRADERS INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.
